name: President Nixon's Diet Special
recipeIngredient: 1/4 green pepper, seeded and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry lettuce leaves.
2. Arrange lettuce on individual serving plates.
3. Mound cottage cheese in the center of each plate.
4. Set crackers around the edges of the cottage cheese.
5. Encircle with vegetables or fruits as desired.
Plain cottage cheese can also be enlivened with a variety of other fresh vegetables, raw or lightly steamed, and fruits, fresh or canned (without added sugar).
